text.en: Chinook pushed game AI from competitive play toward mathematical solution. The University of Alberta team combined opening books, deep alpha-beta search, expert evaluation, and enormous endgame databases, eventually proving that perfect play in checkers leads to a draw.
text.zh: Chinook 把游戏 AI 从竞技对弈推进到数学求解。阿尔伯塔大学团队结合开局库、深层 alpha-beta 搜索、专家评估和庞大残局数据库，最终证明跳棋在完美对弈下结果为和棋。

text.en: Perfect play in checkers is a draw
text.zh: 跳棋完美对弈结果为和棋
